event_title: [Partner Event] HuggingFace Open Source AI Meetup
title: HuggingFace Open Source AI Meetup
description: **Please note -- this event requires [RSVP on this website](https://partiful.com/e/fE0XH0PrSOZB9ezYuFbW) (Need Your Phone Number)** **[Hugging Face](https://huggingface.co)** Founder [@ClementDelangue](https://twitter.com/ClementDelangue) & team members will be hosting a big community event in San Francisco this Friday evening. Please join us for this exciting event in-person in San Francisco!
